entry.title: Fluxel — AI image generator for product photos
entry.content: Generate studio-quality product images with AI. Great for ecommerce sellers.

entry.title: MeetScribe: AI meeting notes and transcription
entry.content: Automatic meeting transcription and summaries for remote teams.

entry.title: CodePilotX — AI coding agent in your IDE
entry.content: An AI developer copilot that writes and reviews code inside your editor.
